data.description:
Close the last ~10% of the E2E config-matrix coverage identified by the audit. The team already has strong infrastructure (a dedicated `.github/workflows/optionality.yml` lean-install lane; both gates tested on/off and LLM-unavailable). This is finishing, not building — and explicitly WITHOUT duplicating gate-logic tests (do NOT touch `test_parity.py`'s intended 3-surface duplication).

## Why
Three narrow seams remain uncovered; closing them protects client-facing workflows across the optional-dependency / gate-flag matrix.

## What / files (gap -> fix)
- F1 (Medium): the completion CLOSE gate is proven fail-closed only via the library; not driven over CLI/MCP. Add ~2 parametrized cases to `tests/interfaces/facades/test_verify_completion_facades.py` (drive `rebar transition … closed` via `_cli.main` and via MCP `call_tool("transition_ticket", …)` with `require_completion_verification_for_close=true` + a monkeypatched FAIL verdict; assert blocked + correct exit code / tool-error envelope). Reuse the existing canned verdict — do NOT re-test gate logic.
- F2 (Low): the completion fail-closed path is only SIMULATED (monkeypatched `LLMConfigError`), never run with the real `[agents]` extra absent. Include `tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_completion_gate.py::test_gate_missing_llm_fails_closed` in the `clean-core-wheel` lane's pytest invocation in `.github/workflows/optionality.yml` (CI-yaml only).
- F3 (Low): add `mcp` and `grounding` to the `optionality.yml` per-extra matrix (currently agents/eval/tracing); add a `rebar-mcp --help` boot check for the mcp entry.
- OSS-standard hardening (cheap adds): a `tests/conftest.py` `sys.meta_path` fixture to SIMULATE an uninstalled extra (precedent: kopf/linkml) so the degradation path is asserted in-suite, and set `pydantic_ai`'s `models.ALLOW_MODEL_REQUESTS = False` as a CI safety net against accidental live calls.

## Scope
In: F1/F2/F3 + the conftest fixture + the no-live-calls net. Out: any new test tier; re-testing gate logic per surface (only the surface wrapper / exit-code mapping needs the extra case).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Completion close gate fail-closed is tested over BOTH CLI and MCP (F1) with correct exit code / error envelope.
- [ ] `test_gate_missing_llm_fails_closed` runs in the clean-core-wheel lean lane (F2).
- [ ] `optionality.yml` per-extra matrix includes `mcp` (+ `rebar-mcp --help` boot) and `grounding` (F3).
- [ ] A conftest fixture can block an extra via `sys.meta_path` and a test asserts the friendly degradation fires.
- [ ] `models.ALLOW_MODEL_REQUESTS = False` guards the suite against accidental live LLM calls.
- [ ] No duplication of existing gate-logic tests; `test_parity.py` untouched.
data.title: Close the last 10% of E2E config-matrix tests (F1/F2/F3)
